fields.label: Cherry Item

fields.label: Wet Mill Warehouse

fields.description: Source warehouse for Coffee Dispatch delivery notes (milled/clean coffee store)
fields.label: Milled Store Warehouse

fields.description: Weight of one bag in kg, used to compute dispatch quantities
fields.label: Bag Weight (kg)

fields.description: Item representing outgrower/estate parchment in stores
fields.label: Parchment Item

fields.description: Warehouse parchment is transferred into for dry milling
fields.label: Dry Mill Warehouse
Endebess (Outgrower)
fields.description: Point these at whatever names you used when creating the service Items, Price List, and Grower Type attribute in the UI. Leave blank to disable auto-populate — the SO items table then stays fully manual.
Price List rates are pulled from when auto-populating the SO items table. Falls back to the SO's own selling_price_list.
fields.label: Endebess Price List

fields.description: Service item billed per tonne of parchment received.
fields.label: Milling Service Item

fields.description: Service item billed per 60-kg bag of parchment received.
fields.label: Handling Service Item

fields.description: Service item billed per 60-kg bag of output, added when the SO Transport toggle is on.
fields.label: Transport Service Item

fields.description: Suffix appended to a grade item_code to resolve its Outgrower variant (e.g. 'AA' + '-OG' = 'AA-OG').
fields.label: Outgrower Variant Suffix
